overall.description: Game engine footage from a first-person perspective inside a military vehicle driving through a historic European-style city center. The vehicle proceeds through traffic lights and along streets lined with stone buildings and shop fronts under clear afternoon skies.

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green
vehicle accelerates from stationary position through the intersection

agents.ego_description: waiting at red light in a camouflaged military vehicle, then accelerating forward as the light turns green

entered.detail: Multi-story historic stone building with tall windows lining the left side of the street
Historic stone building with ground floor shops on the right side
Traffic signal suspended over the intersection showing red then green
Storefront with green painted facade and signage on the left sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a city intersection with the vehicle stationary at a red light. Historic stone buildings line both sides of the street. As the traffic light turns green, the military vehicle accelerates forward through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic commercial street with ground floor shops

agents.ego_description: cruising steadily down the city street between rows of historic buildings

entered.detail: Yellow diamond-shaped traffic sign mounted on a pole
Red fabric awning extending over a shop entrance
Traffic signal on the left side of the street showing green

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels down a straight city street lined with historic stone buildings. The camera passes various shop fronts including a green-painted store and a red awning. A traffic light is passed on the left side as the vehicle maintains a steady speed through the commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching city intersection with cross street

events.description: white car becomes visible ahead at the next intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the next intersection where a white car is visible ahead

notable_agents.action: white car waiting at or crossing the intersection ahead

entered.detail: Opening to the next intersection with cross street visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches the next intersection where the street opens up. A white car is visible ahead at the cross street. The historic stone buildings continue on both sides as the vehicle nears the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a stationary position at a city intersection into a steady drive through a historic commercial district. It begins with the vehicle paused at a red light amidst towering stone buildings, accelerating forward as the signal turns green. As the vehicle gains momentum, the camera glides past a series of shop fronts, including a green-painted store and a red awning, while passing a traffic light on the left. The scene then opens up as the vehicle maintains its speed, approaching a wider intersection where a white car is visible ahead. Finally, the camera continues its trajectory through the street, flanked by the consistent architecture of the historic city center.
